misc.title: 🔔Extremely disturbing case🔔 Recently, a famous mangaka Shoichi Yamamoto is revealed to have been arrested due to; ​🌏Forcing excrement into the 15-year old victim's mouth and smearing excrement over
misc.text: 🔔Extremely disturbing case🔔 Recently, a famous mangaka Shoichi Yamamoto is revealed to have been arrested due to; ​🌏Forcing excrement into the 15-year old victim's mouth and smearing excrement over her face. Forcing the victim to strike poses emphasizing her genital in a hotel and taking photographs. ​Leading acts such as stripping the victim naked outdoors and pulling up her skirt to take photographs. ​Engaging in sexual intercourse with the victim in outdoor public spaces. ​Writing words such as "Teacher's property," "Slave," and "Pet" on the victim's body with a permanent marker. ​Forcing the victim to go out in public with sex toys attached to their body. ​Injecting glycerin into the victim's anus using a hose, causing intense abdominal pain and physical suffering. ​ 🌏​Timeline and Aftermath February 2015: Serialization of "Daten Sakusen" (The Operation of Fallen Heaven) begins. ​April 2016: The victim (15 years old) enters the school. ​Using discussion of his own manga as a pretext, Yamamoto approached the victim. ​March 2019: The victim graduates from high school. ​Although the victim moved outside of Hokkaido, he continued to demand that the victim send him obscene images; ​The victim developed severe PTSD and Dissociative Identity Disorder (DID). 🌏On the 27th February 2026, the editorial team of Shogakukan’s manga app MangaONE announced that it has suspended distribution of his manga and halted shipments of its volumes. The editorial team stated that the mangaka is Shoichi Yamamoto, author of Daten Sakusen. In 2020, after Yamamoto was arrested, Daten Sakusen was discontinued. However, in 2022, the team began serializing Jōjin Kamen under the Ichiro Ichi name.😥 They acknowledged that he should NOT have been appointed as an original author and offered sincere apologies to the victim, readers, illustrator Eri Tsuruyoshi. Regarding settlement discussions between Yamamoto and the victim, the editorial team stated that while it had NO organizational intent to be involved, an editor joined a messaging app group at the request of both parties and advised them to appoint lawyers and formalize the agreement in a notarized document. The team admitted that its understanding of the seriousness of the case was insufficient and that its response was inappropriate, and pledged to prevent recurrence.😥

misc.title: 🎙Eiichiro Oda : There are adults that kill people while declaring, "This is a holy war!", or "This is justice!" And there are children that see that. One Piece will continue for quite some time. All
misc.text: 🎙Eiichiro Oda : There are adults that kill people while declaring, "This is a holy war!", or "This is justice!" And there are children that see that. One Piece will continue for quite some time. All the while praying for world peace. My inner thoughts are always: world peace.

misc.text: I am ashamed of my country. What the fuck are y‘all doing??????? Israel Defense Forces (@IDF) 🇮🇱🤝🇩🇪 Deepening Military Ties: Commander of the German Army concludes his visit to Israel The Commander of the German Army, LTG Christian Freuding, concluded a visit to Israel, hosted by MG Nadav Lotan, Commander of the IDF Ground Forces. For the first time, the two signed a formal cooperation agreement, expanding collaboration—a major milestone in the strategic partnership between Israel and Germany. Together, we stand ready to confront shared challenges and deepen our military cooperation for the future. — https://nitter.net/IDF/status/2024762807149854959#m

items.text: 🔔Extremely disturbing case🔔 Recently, a famous mangaka Shoichi Yamamoto is revealed to have been arrested due to; ​🌏Forcing excrement into the 15-year old victim's mouth and smearing excrement over her face. Forcing the victim to strike poses emphasizing her genital in a hotel and taking photographs. ​Leading acts such as stripping the victim naked outdoors and pulling up her skirt to take photographs. ​Engaging in sexual intercourse with the victim in outdoor public spaces. ​Writing words such as "Teacher's property," "Slave," and "Pet" on the victim's body with a permanent marker. ​Forcing the victim to go out in public with sex toys attached to their body. ​Injecting glycerin into the victim's anus using a hose, causing intense abdominal pain and physical suffering. ​ 🌏​Timeline and Aftermath February 2015: Serialization of "Daten Sakusen" (The Operation of Fallen Heaven) begins. ​April 2016: The victim (15 years old) enters the school. ​Using discussion of his own manga as a pretext, Yamamoto approached the victim. ​March 2019: The victim graduates from high school. ​Although the victim moved outside of Hokkaido, he continued to demand that the victim send him obscene images; ​The victim developed severe PTSD and Dissociative Identity Disorder (DID). 🌏On the 27th February 2026, the editorial team of Shogakukan’s manga app MangaONE announced that it has suspended distribution of his manga and halted shipments of its volumes. The editorial team stated that the mangaka is Shoichi Yamamoto, author of Daten Sakusen. In 2020, after Yamamoto was arrested, Daten Sakusen was discontinued. However, in 2022, the team began serializing Jōjin Kamen under the Ichiro Ichi name.😥 They acknowledged that he should NOT have been appointed as an original author and offered sincere apologies to the victim, readers, illustrator Eri Tsuruyoshi. Regarding settlement discussions between Yamamoto and the victim, the editorial team stated that while it had NO organizational intent to be involved, an editor joined a messaging app group at the request of both parties and advised them to appoint lawyers and formalize the agreement in a notarized document. The team admitted that its understanding of the seriousness of the case was insufficient and that its response was inappropriate, and pledged to prevent recurrence.😥
